purpose: Six-card stat strip across the top of the dashboard view: Total, Completed, In Progress, Failed, Pending, Elapsed. Each StatCard is keyboard-accessible (role=button + Enter/Space) and toggles `activeStatFilter` via dispatch SET key=activeStatFilter — null for Total (clears), specific status string for the others. Elapsed card is special: clicks call `onOpenTimeline` instead of filtering, and its value live-ticks every 1s while the task is running (no completed_at).
gotchas: Total card uses null filter (clears any active filter) — toggle logic is asymmetric: `filter === null || activeStatFilter === filter ? null : filter` means clicking the active card clears it, but clicking Total always clears.
Elapsed counter ticks regardless of whether the user is viewing the dashboard — the interval runs as long as the task is in-progress and the StatsBar is mounted.

Counts derived twice: from task fields (total_tasks/completed_tasks/failed_tasks) when available, from the agents array otherwise. Mismatches between init plan and live agents can cause the totals to flicker.
patterns: computeElapsed wrapped in useCallback to keep the effect's deps stable; effect cleans up the interval on completion or unmount.
conventions: Number color via class names (.total/.completed/.in-progress/.failed/.pending/.elapsed); active state via .stat-active modifier.
